## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets
- [ ] No `.env` contents
- [ ] No stash apply/pop/drop
- [ ] No GitHub-CI rerun
- [ ] No unscoped lockfile/dependency changes
- [ ] No build/dist artifacts unless explicitly scoped
- [ ] Human approval required before merge
